variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of non-D&A operating rows only, and explicit D&A lines appear separately above EBIT, so separate XSGA_DA additions are warranted. 'Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill' is excluded because it may overlap with the more granular amortization rows, and the only available summary row includes impairment ('Depreciation, Amortization and Impairment'), which should not be used. Manual review is flagged because the statement taxonomy suggests some overlap/duplication among amortization labels in at least one period, so the conservative approach is to keep only the more specific non-impairment component rows.
